fortune_decode: Agent second brain. 6 sessions distilled. Latest: 2026-05-09. Projects: repo-copilot. Top concepts: archive_block, notion-ops-soft-delete, unarchive-support, cleanup-audit, notion-ops-result-write-verified, multi-user provisioning, bootstrap URL pattern, gist template with placeholders, provision GitHub Action, Notion Roadmap DB.

notes.title: archive_block op added to notion-ops
notes.decisions: Added archive_block op — PATCH /blocks/{id} with archived:true; unarchive boolean supported
notes.open_questions: Should we also add a dedicated archive_database alias op for clarity?

notes.title: Cleanup audit — 3 Alice items resolved
notes.decisions: Items 1 and 3 already clean; Item 2 (archive old DB) needs Jared action in Notion
notes.open_questions: Should we add archive_database op to notion-ops to avoid future manual Notion steps?

notes.title: Full build order + roadmap + Bob message sent
notes.decisions: Space instructions = one bootstrap URL pointing to identity gist, not generated text. Build order finalized across 4 phases. Notion Roadmap DB is next build step.
notes.open_questions: Provision Action design: GitHub App vs PAT for multi-user repo forking? space-card backend: serverless function or GitHub Action?

notes.title: Turn-level brain push mandate wired
notes.decisions: Every Alice turn ends with append_note as slot 3. Minimum viable note = title+date+source+cid. Work splits across turns if slot 3 is needed for brain push.
notes.open_questions: Bob and Charlie Space instructions need same turn-level mandate. Perplexity Space instructions may need manual update by Jared.

notes.title: adapter_ref + G-008 ALERT + Charlie slot + notion-ops SKILL Stone + brain.json read primitive
notes.decisions: adapter_ref field added to QA.Stone gist block — SKILL Stones now self-invoking via adapter_ref path. G-008 ALERT type formalized as type spec + lifecycle doc. Charlie agent slot seeded with orientation message and full stack state. notion-ops registered as first live SKILL Stone with adapter_ref pointing to queue.json. brain.json read primitive implemented as export_brain op in notion-ops.yml + standalone brain-export.yml workflow with 3 triggers (push, manual, daily 06:00 UTC).
notes.open_questions: Three-Agents Demo build not yet started — demo HTML seed, demo-run.md, Notion build log, GitHub Pages deploy all pending. notion-ops SKILL Stone gist_id is null — needs a real gist.github.com wormhole.

notes.title: gitzip hardening + Path A: Agent Notes DB live
notes.decisions: Hardened gitzip-push before Three Agents Demo (blocking cleared). Added create_database, append_row, append_note to notion-ops. Provisioned Agent Notes DB via create_database op. Registered as G-010 BRAIN in gist registry. append_note is the canonical session-end write primitive going forward.
notes.open_questions: When to build brain.json read primitive (G-010 gist export Action)? Alice still needs to ship: adapter_ref QA.Stone amendment, G-008 ALERT gist, Charlie agent slot, notion-ops QA.Stone SKILL Stone registration.
